title: Sales Admin/Quantity Surveyor
description:
Company Overview / Employee Value Proposition

Intellihub specialises in harnessing smart technology solutions for residential, commercial, hospitality, and industrial segments. Together with our long-time partners STEINEL, ABB and LUTRON, we are constantly pushing boundaries to deliver intelligent, award-winning products and solutions to our customers. Our products and solutions shape the future of building automation and energy efficiency. Join our expanding regional HQ and be part of a team bringing cutting-edge sensor solutions to the region. Be part of our team bringing cutting-edge sensor solutions to the region

  • [www.intellihub.com.sg](http: //www.intellihub.com.sg/)

Job Summary

We are seeking a Sales Administrator cum Quantity Surveyor who is both detail-oriented and commercially minded. This dual-role position supports the sales team while managing cost estimation, quotations, and project cost controls from tender stage through project completion.

Responsibilities

  • Prepare accurate sales quotations, proposals, and contracts by analyzing client requirements to support successful sales outcomes
  • Coordinate communication and workflow between sales, operations, and project teams to ensure timely and efficient order processing
  • Respond promptly to client inquiries and follow up to maintain strong customer relationships and support contract administration
  • Support tender submissions by compiling required documentation and verifying compliance with tender specifications
  • Develop detailed cost estimates, Bills of Quantities (BQ), and project budgets to enable effective financial planning and control
  • Analyze technical drawings, specifications, and tender documents to identify project requirements and cost implications

Required competencies and certifications

  • Diploma or Degree in Accounting, Business Administration, or related discipline
  • Proficiency in Microsoft Excel, Word, and basic accounting software such as Quickbooks

Preferred competencies and qualifications

  • 1–3 years of relevant experience in finance or logistics, preferably within electronics, lighting, or technical product sectors
  • Strong coordination and multitasking skills demonstrated through managing multiple projects or tasks simultaneously
  • Effective communication skills combined with a positive learning attitude to adapt and grow within the role

What We Offer

  • Competitive salary with performance-based incentives
  • Exposure to both commercial sales and project cost management
  • Career growth opportunities in a dynamic and growing company

postedCompany.description:
We exist to enrich your life. We help you live smarter, happier and greener.


Creating huge benefits for Customers is our priority. We specialise in smart control solutions for residential, commercial, hospitality and industrial segments. We offer consultancy, integration, development, installation and project management.

We deliver quality products and systems from ABB, LUTRON and STEINEL.


www.intellihub.com.sg
